html:
Exclusive to:

Pearl's Pearl is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be obtained from the Crabby Hermit by following her questline.

Its main purpose is to be socketed into the Crab King for the boss fight. Socketing the pearl buffs the Crab King significantly, but it makes the King drop the Inactive Celestial Tribute. When the Crab King is defeated, Pearl's Pearl turns into a Cracked Pearl.

Cracked Pearl

Exclusive to:

The Cracked Pearl is the second form of Pearl's Pearl, and can only be retrieved from the Crab King after it is defeated. It can be given back to the Crabby Hermit for extra dialogue. Afterwards, inspecting any Message in a Bottle is guaranteed to reveal a Sunken Chest as long as there's less than 10 on the map.

Trivia

  • The Pearl's Pearl and the Cracked Pearl were introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

Pearl's Pearl
Object Info
Perk
Socket in Crab King to loot Inactive Celestial Tribute
Does not stack
Miscellaneous
"hermit_pearl"
Exclusive to:
“I'll take good care of it.”
–Wilson
“Don't worry grams, it's safe with me!”
–Willow
“Will take good care of shiny stone!”
–Wolfgang
“I will be its caretaker.”
–Wendy
“I WILL TAKE THIS AS PAYMENT”
–WX-78
“Oh dear, I do hope I can find him.”
–Wickerbottom
“C'mon Lucy, let's find that crab!”
–Woodie
“It's... strange to be so trusted.”
–Maxwell
“I shall prötect it with my life!”
–Wigfrid
“We'll take really good care of it!”
–Webber
“Madame Pearl entrusted it to me.”
–Warly
“Shiny!”
–Wormwood
“I know a bit about not givin' up on someone.”
–Winona
“A treasured treasure.”
–Wortox
“Oooooh, so shiny!”
–Wurt
“I gave my Pinetree Pioneer's oath to protect it with my life!”
–Walter
“I'll... do my best.”
–Wanda
Pearl's Pearl is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be obtained from the Crabby Hermit by following her questline.
Its main purpose is to be socketed into the Crab King for the boss fight. Socketing the pearl buffs the Crab King significantly, but it makes the King drop the Inactive Celestial Tribute. When the Crab King is defeated, Pearl's Pearl turns into a Cracked Pearl.

Miscellaneous

Exclusive to:
“I... didn't take good care of it.”
–Wilson
“Oops...”
–Willow
“Wolfgang did not take good care of shiny stone.”
–Wolfgang
“I seem to leave only misery in my wake...”
–Wendy
“MISTAKES WERE MADE”
–WX-78
“I should tell her.”
–Wickerbottom
“I was only trying to help...”
–Woodie
“Ah. I thought I'd run out of people to disappoint.”
–Maxwell
“The battle is wön, but at what cöst?”
–Wigfrid
“We hope Ms. Pearl isn't too mad at us...”
–Webber
“Oh... oh dear...”
–Warly
“Broken...”
–Wormwood
“I'm so sorry, Pearl.”
–Winona
“A shattered hope.”
–Wortox
“D-didn't do it!”
–Wurt
“Oh no, oh no no no no...”
–Walter
“I was holding out hope things would go differently this time.”
–Wanda
The Cracked Pearl is the second form of Pearl's Pearl, and can only be retrieved from the Crab King after it is defeated. It can be given back to the Crabby Hermit for extra dialogue. Afterwards, inspecting any Message in a Bottle is guaranteed to reveal a Sunken Chest as long as there's less than 10 on the map.

The Pearl's Pearl and the Cracked Pearl were introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.

'''Pearl's Pearl''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It can be obtained from the [[Crabby Hermit]] by following her questline.

Its main purpose is to be socketed into the [[Crab King]] for the boss fight. Socketing the pearl buffs the Crab King significantly, but it makes the King drop the [[Inactive Celestial Tribute]]. When the Crab King is defeated, Pearl's Pearl turns into a '''Cracked Pearl'''.

{{Clear}}

The '''Cracked Pearl''' is the second form of Pearl's Pearl, and can only be retrieved from the Crab King after it is defeated. It can be given back to the Crabby Hermit for [[Crabby Hermit/Quotes|extra dialogue]]. Afterwards, inspecting any [[Message in a Bottle/DST|Message in a Bottle]] is guaranteed to reveal a [[Sunken Chest]] as long as there's less than 10 on the map.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Pearl's Pearl and the Cracked Pearl were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update.
